Even if RED rejects this aggressive counter, I remain fully capable of accepting a revised offer closer to my 60 ZUP limit. The strategy balances boldness with pragmatism: by anchoring low, I increase the likelihood of securing a deal at a more favorable price than the initial 35 ZUP, all while ensuring I never exceed my budget. This approach prioritizes **optimizing payoff** over passive acceptance, leveraging negotiation dynamics to my advantage. </reason>
